title: quercus lanuginosa var. microbalanos
intro: Quercus lanuginosa var. microbalanos, also known as the small-leaved evergreen oak or microbalanos oak, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Quercus lanuginosa species, a type of evergreen tree native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is valued for its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Quercus lanuginosa var. microbalanos include its potential to protect against cardiovascular disease, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or used topically to promote healing and wellness.
